text: I wander into this brightly-lit, modern space and sense a collision of utility and creativity. The stark glass, clean lines, and electric glow create both excitement and sterility. Inside, the R+D wall exudes the promise of innovation, yet also a rehearsed, curated emotion—a museum of ideas. I feel like an observer, slightly distanced, yet compelled to participate in this narrative of progress. Curiosity tinged with skepticism washes over me: what knowledge here is truly alive, and what is display?
